description: Redesign Cart, Checkout, Orders, and Order Detail screens with premium animations and real data
steps: Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/cart/presentation/cart_screen.dart: Dismissible slide-to-delete with red background and trash icon, animated quantity increment/decrement (scale animation on number change), product images from network, item subtotals, GST breakdown section, savings callout badge, empty cart illustration with 'Start Shopping' button, sticky bottom bar with total and checkout button, AnimatedList for smooth add/remove transitions

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/checkout/presentation/checkout_screen.dart: step indicator at top (address > payment > review - animated progress dots), address picker cards with map pin icon and default badge, delivery slot selector (time grid cards with selected state animation), payment method cards (COD, UPI, Card, Wallet) with radio selection and icons, promo code input with 'Apply' button and success/error state, order summary card with subtotal/GST/delivery/discount/total breakdown, place order button with loading state, loyalty points slider/input

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/orders/presentation/orders_screen.dart: pull-to-refresh, status filter chips at top (All, Active, Delivered, Cancelled), order cards with status badge (colored), order items preview (small product thumbnails), delivery date/time, animated list with stagger, empty state per filter, shimmer loading

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/orders/presentation/order_detail_screen.dart: status timeline with animated connectors (vertical stepper with icons per status), order items list with images and prices, price breakdown card, delivery partner info card (when assigned), live tracking button (navigates to tracking placeholder), address card with map icon, payment info section, cancel/reorder buttons at bottom
Create mobile/lib/features/orders/providers/orders_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for: order list (with pagination), order detail by ID, using the existing OrderRepository

Create mobile/lib/features/cart/providers/cart_provider.dart - Riverpod StateNotifier for cart state: items list, add/remove/update quantity, subtotal/total calculations, using existing CartRepository
acceptance_criteria: Cart screen has slide-to-delete with Dismissible widget
Cart screen has animated quantity controls
Checkout has step indicator with 3 steps
Checkout has delivery slot time grid selector
Orders screen has status filter chips and pull-to-refresh
Order detail has animated status timeline
Riverpod providers exist for orders and cart
All screens have shimmer loading and error states
verification: Verify checkout_screen.dart has step indicator widget
Verify orders_screen.dart has filter chips and RefreshIndicator
